Notes.Text:
This update for expat fixes the following issues:

- CVE-2026-24515: Fixed a null dereference in XML_ExternalEntityParserCreate. (bsc#1257144)
- CVE-2026-25210: Fixed an integer overflow in doContent. (bsc#1257496)

Notes.Title: Patchnames

Vulnerabilities.Description: In libexpat before 2.7.4, XML_ExternalEntityParserCreate does not copy unknown encoding handler user data.
In libexpat before 2.7.4, the doContent function does not properly determine the buffer size bufSize because there is no integer overflow check for tag buffer reallocation.
